# LLMCosts.dev — Ibm-Granite Models Pricing

> Updated: 2026-04-09
> Route cheaper via OpenRouter: https://openrouter.ai/?ref=llmcosts
(Part 1)

| Model | Provider | Input/1M | Output/1M | Cached/1M | Context | ELO | Tier | Type |
|-------|----------|----------|---------|---------|---------|-----|------|------|
| [IBM: Granite 4.0 Micro](https://llmcosts.dev/models/granite-4.0-h-micro) | Ibm-granite | $0.017 | $0.11 | $None | 131,000 | 1200 | standard | Closed |
